title: July 4th Closure
html:
We are closed from July 4th to July 11th.

We will open again on July 12th at 3pm.

Thank you for your continued patronage.

— Zien Hong Management

title: Reservations Notice
html:
Reservations are accepted only on days that are not holidays.

Thank you for your continued patronage.

— Zien Hong Management

title: Closed For Thanksgiving
html:
We are closed all day Nov 27, 2025.

Best regards,

— Zien Hong Management

title: Holidays 2025
html:
We are open on Christmas Eve and Christmas Day from 12pm to 10pm.

We are open on New Years Eve and New Years Day from 12pm to 10pm.

We are not accepting reservations for these days.

Thank you for your continued patronage.

— Zien Hong Management
